summary: Make macOS install and update path usable from GitHub releases
description: Add macOS release artifacts plus a one-command install/update script so Viggo can install Mega Vault Viewer on MacBook and rerun updates after future agent releases.
acceptance: A macOS user can run one script to install/update latest GitHub release; GitHub release workflow uploads macOS app/archive assets on tags; local checks pass

evidence.summary: Added GitHub Releases macOS install/update channel: release-macos workflow builds aarch64/x86_64 macOS app+DMG assets, scripts/install-macos.sh installs/updates latest release to /Applications, versions bumped to 0.1.1, docs/changelog updated. Verified npm run check, bash -n install script, node --check tauri-build, go validate, release workflow smoke.
